_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Identify and correct potential company compliance gaps and/or areas of risk to ensure full compliance with privacy regulations.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to assess organizational compliance posture across multiple jurisdictions simultaneously, identifying coverage gaps, requirement conflicts, and opportunities for harmonized compliance approaches.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-S-001 (RC, cosine: 0.582), RC-A-005 (RC, cosine: 0.555).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.523). Shared vocabulary: [compliance, gaps]. DCWF-only terms [areas, company, correct, ensure, full, identify] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, across, approaches, assess, conflicts, coverage] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.882, R=0.876). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Identify and correct potential company compliance gaps and/or areas of risk to e" and "Ability to assess organizational compliance posture across multiple jurisdiction" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.600 > STS 0.523 (gap +0.076). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [compliance, gaps] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.1%. Shared tokens: [compliance, gaps]. DCWF-only: [areas, company, correct, ensure, full, identify]. WIDAI-only: [ability, across, approaches, assess, conflicts, coverage].
